name: Un utilisateur peut naviguer vers les principales sections du site via la barre de navigation

steps.name: Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Accepter les cookies' })
Wait for selector getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Mot de passe' })
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Se connecter' })
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Se connecter' })
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Se connecter' })
Open Wallet page to start not in Dashboard
Wait for selector locator('#scroll').getByText('Achat récurrent', { exact: true })
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: 'Créer un plan d\'achat' })
Click getByTestId('marketSearch').getByRole('link', { name: /Plan Bitcoin Famille|Bitcoin Family Plan/ })
Wait for selector locator('#scroll').getByText('Plan Bitcoin Famille', { exact: true })
